calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff, Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants The Yard Man Inc., Edna M. Hale or Brett Hale.
Defaults were entered against defendants on March 24, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 24, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 21, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants The Yard Man Inc., Edna M. Hale and Brett Hale as follows:

Damages/Principal - $145,385.73.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,325.15.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $461.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $153,671.88.

It is further Ordered and Adjudged that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in Exhibit A of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
